question: The chart shows the annual budget distribution of City A in various sectors. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Education receives more budget than Safety.
options.B: Healthcare accounts for the largest share of the budget.
options.C: Others receives a larger share of the budget than any other single sector.
options.D: Infrastructure receives more budget than Education.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Others: 35%; Safety: 25%; Education: 22%; Healthcare: 10%; Infrastructure: 8%.
